    EditableProject

    object
    slugstring

    The slug of a project, used for vanity URLs. Regex: ^[\w!@$()`.+,"\-']{3,64}$

    titlestring

    The title or name of the project

    descriptionstring

    A short description of the project

    categoriesArray<string>

    A list of the categories that the project has

    client_sidestringrequiredoptionalunsupportedunknown

    The client side support of the project

    server_sidestringrequiredoptionalunsupportedunknown

    The server side support of the project

    bodystring

    A long form description of the project

    statusstringapprovedarchivedrejecteddraftunlistedprocessingwithheldscheduledprivateunknown

    The status of the project

    requested_statusstring | nullapprovedarchivedunlistedprivatedraft

    The requested status when submitting for review or scheduling the project for release

    additional_categoriesArray<string>

    A list of categories which are searchable but non-primary

    issues_urlstring | null

    An optional link to where to submit bugs or issues with the project

    source_urlstring | null

    An optional link to the source code of the project

    wiki_urlstring | null

    An optional link to the project's wiki page or other relevant information

    discord_urlstring | null

    An optional invite link to the project's discord

    donation_urlsArray<ProjectDonationURL>

    A list of donation links for the project

    Show child attributes
    idstring

    The ID of the donation platform

    platformstring

    The donation platform this link is to

    urlstring

    The URL of the donation platform and user

    license_idstring

    The SPDX license ID of a project

    license_urlstring | null

    The URL to this license

    moderation_messagestring | null

    The title of the moderators' message for the project

    moderation_message_bodystring | null

    The body of the moderators' message for the project

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "slug": "my_project",
  "title": "My Project",
  "description": "A short description",
  "categories": [
    "technology",
    "adventure",
    "fabric"
  ],
  "client_side": "required",
  "server_side": "optional",
  "body": "A long body describing my project in detail",
  "status": "approved",
  "requested_status": "approved",
  "additional_categories": [
    "technology",
    "adventure",
    "fabric"
  ],
  "issues_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project/issues",
  "source_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project",
  "wiki_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project/wiki",
  "discord_url": "https://discord.gg/AaBbCcDd",
  "donation_urls": [
    {
      "id": "patreon",
      "platform": "Patreon",
      "url": "https://www.patreon.com/my_user"
    }
  ],
  "license_id": "LGPL-3.0-or-later",
  "license_url": "string",
  "moderation_message": "string",
  "moderation_message_body": "string"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "slug": "my_project",
  "title": "My Project",
  "description": "A short description",
  "categories": [
    "technology",
    "adventure",
    "fabric"
  ],
  "client_side": "required",
  "server_side": "optional",
  "body": "A long body describing my project in detail",
  "status": "approved",
  "requested_status": "approved",
  "additional_categories": [
    "technology",
    "adventure",
    "fabric"
  ],
  "issues_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project/issues",
  "source_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project",
  "wiki_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project/wiki",
  "discord_url": "https://discord.gg/AaBbCcDd",
  "donation_urls": [
    {
      "id": "patreon",
      "platform": "Patreon",
      "url": "https://www.patreon.com/my_user"
    }
  ],
  "license_id": "LGPL-3.0-or-later",
  "license_url": "string",
  "moderation_message": "string",
  "moderation_message_body": "string"
}

    AuthError

    object
    errorstringrequired

    The name of the error

    descriptionstringrequired

    The contents of the error

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "error": "unauthorized",
  "description": "Authentication Error: Invalid Authentication Credentials"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "error": "unauthorized",
  "description": "Authentication Error: Invalid Authentication Credentials"
}

    PatchProjectsBody

    object
    categoriesArray<string>

    Set all of the categories to the categories specified here

    add_categoriesArray<string>

    Add all of the categories specified here

    remove_categoriesArray<string>

    Remove all of the categories specified here

    additional_categoriesArray<string>

    Set all of the additional categories to the categories specified here

    add_additional_categoriesArray<string>

    Add all of the additional categories specified here

    remove_additional_categoriesArray<string>

    Remove all of the additional categories specified here

    donation_urlsArray<ProjectDonationURL>

    Set all of the donation links to the donation links specified here

    Show child attributes
    idstring

    The ID of the donation platform

    platformstring

    The donation platform this link is to

    urlstring

    The URL of the donation platform and user

    add_donation_urlsArray<ProjectDonationURL>

    Add all of the donation links specified here

    Show child attributes
    idstring

    The ID of the donation platform

    platformstring

    The donation platform this link is to

    urlstring

    The URL of the donation platform and user

    remove_donation_urlsArray<ProjectDonationURL>

    Remove all of the donation links specified here

    Show child attributes
    idstring

    The ID of the donation platform

    platformstring

    The donation platform this link is to

    urlstring

    The URL of the donation platform and user

    issues_urlstring | null

    An optional link to where to submit bugs or issues with the projects

    source_urlstring | null

    An optional link to the source code of the projects

    wiki_urlstring | null

    An optional link to the projects' wiki page or other relevant information

    discord_urlstring | null

    An optional invite link to the projects' discord

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "categories": [
    "string"
  ],
  "add_categories": [
    "string"
  ],
  "remove_categories": [
    "string"
  ],
  "additional_categories": [
    "string"
  ],
  "add_additional_categories": [
    "string"
  ],
  "remove_additional_categories": [
    "string"
  ],
  "donation_urls": [
    {
      "id": "patreon",
      "platform": "Patreon",
      "url": "https://www.patreon.com/my_user"
    }
  ],
  "add_donation_urls": [
    {
      "id": "patreon",
      "platform": "Patreon",
      "url": "https://www.patreon.com/my_user"
    }
  ],
  "remove_donation_urls": [
    {
      "id": "patreon",
      "platform": "Patreon",
      "url": "https://www.patreon.com/my_user"
    }
  ],
  "issues_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project/issues",
  "source_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project",
  "wiki_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project/wiki",
  "discord_url": "https://discord.gg/AaBbCcDd"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "categories": [
    "string"
  ],
  "add_categories": [
    "string"
  ],
  "remove_categories": [
    "string"
  ],
  "additional_categories": [
    "string"
  ],
  "add_additional_categories": [
    "string"
  ],
  "remove_additional_categories": [
    "string"
  ],
  "donation_urls": [
    {
      "id": "patreon",
      "platform": "Patreon",
      "url": "https://www.patreon.com/my_user"
    }
  ],
  "add_donation_urls": [
    {
      "id": "patreon",
      "platform": "Patreon",
      "url": "https://www.patreon.com/my_user"
    }
  ],
  "remove_donation_urls": [
    {
      "id": "patreon",
      "platform": "Patreon",
      "url": "https://www.patreon.com/my_user"
    }
  ],
  "issues_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project/issues",
  "source_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project",
  "wiki_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project/wiki",
  "discord_url": "https://discord.gg/AaBbCcDd"
}

    CreateProjectBody

    object
    dataBaseProject & object & object & objectrequired
    iconstring<binary>*.png*.jpg*.jpeg*.bmp*.gif*.webp*.svg*.svgz*.rgb

    Project icon file

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "data": {
    "slug": "my_project",
    "title": "My Project",
    "description": "A short description",
    "categories": [
      "technology",
      "adventure",
      "fabric"
    ],
    "client_side": "required",
    "server_side": "optional",
    "body": "A long body describing my project in detail",
    "status": "approved",
    "requested_status": "approved",
    "additional_categories": [
      "technology",
      "adventure",
      "fabric"
    ],
    "issues_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project/issues",
    "source_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project",
    "wiki_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project/wiki",
    "discord_url": "https://discord.gg/AaBbCcDd",
    "donation_urls": [
      {
        "id": "patreon",
        "platform": "Patreon",
        "url": "https://www.patreon.com/my_user"
      }
    ],
    "license_id": "LGPL-3.0-or-later",
    "license_url": "string",
    "project_type": "modpack",
    "initial_versions": [
      {
        "name": "Version 1.0.0",
        "version_number": "1.0.0",
        "changelog": "List of changes in this version: ...",
        "dependencies": [
          {
            "version_id": "IIJJKKLL",
            "project_id": "QQRRSSTT",
            "file_name": "sodium-fabric-mc1.19-0.4.2+build.16.jar",
            "dependency_type": "required"
          }
        ],
        "game_versions": [
          "1.16.5",
          "1.17.1"
        ],
        "version_type": "release",
        "loaders": [
          "fabric",
          "forge",
          "minecraft"
        ],
        "featured": true,
        "status": "listed",
        "requested_status": "listed",
        "primary_file": [
          "sha1",
          "aaaabbbbccccddddeeeeffffgggghhhhiiiijjjj"
        ],
        "file_types": [
          {
            "algorithm": "sha1",
            "hash": "aaaabbbbccccddddeeeeffffgggghhhhiiiijjjj"
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
    "is_draft": true,
    "gallery_items": [
      {
        "item": "string",
        "featured": true,
        "title": "My awesome screenshot!",
        "description": "This awesome screenshot shows all of the blocks in my mod!",
        "ordering": 0
      }
    ]
  },
  "icon": "*.png"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "data": {
    "slug": "my_project",
    "title": "My Project",
    "description": "A short description",
    "categories": [
      "technology",
      "adventure",
      "fabric"
    ],
    "client_side": "required",
    "server_side": "optional",
    "body": "A long body describing my project in detail",
    "status": "approved",
    "requested_status": "approved",
    "additional_categories": [
      "technology",
      "adventure",
      "fabric"
    ],
    "issues_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project/issues",
    "source_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project",
    "wiki_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project/wiki",
    "discord_url": "https://discord.gg/AaBbCcDd",
    "donation_urls": [
      {
        "id": "patreon",
        "platform": "Patreon",
        "url": "https://www.patreon.com/my_user"
      }
    ],
    "license_id": "LGPL-3.0-or-later",
    "license_url": "string",
    "project_type": "modpack",
    "initial_versions": [
      {
        "name": "Version 1.0.0",
        "version_number": "1.0.0",
        "changelog": "List of changes in this version: ...",
        "dependencies": [
          {
            "version_id": "IIJJKKLL",
            "project_id": "QQRRSSTT",
            "file_name": "sodium-fabric-mc1.19-0.4.2+build.16.jar",
            "dependency_type": "required"
          }
        ],
        "game_versions": [
          "1.16.5",
          "1.17.1"
        ],
        "version_type": "release",
        "loaders": [
          "fabric",
          "forge",
          "minecraft"
        ],
        "featured": true,
        "status": "listed",
        "requested_status": "listed",
        "primary_file": [
          "sha1",
          "aaaabbbbccccddddeeeeffffgggghhhhiiiijjjj"
        ],
        "file_types": [
          {
            "algorithm": "sha1",
            "hash": "aaaabbbbccccddddeeeeffffgggghhhhiiiijjjj"
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
    "is_draft": true,
    "gallery_items": [
      {
        "item": "string",
        "featured": true,
        "title": "My awesome screenshot!",
        "description": "This awesome screenshot shows all of the blocks in my mod!",
        "ordering": 0
      }
    ]
  },
  "icon": "*.png"
}

    ProjectResult

    object
    slugstring

    The slug of a project, used for vanity URLs. Regex: ^[\w!@$()`.+,"\-']{3,64}$

    titlestring

    The title or name of the project

    descriptionstring

    A short description of the project

    categoriesArray<string>

    A list of the categories that the project has

    client_sidestringrequiredoptionalunsupportedunknown

    The client side support of the project

    server_sidestringrequiredoptionalunsupportedunknown

    The server side support of the project

    project_typestringmodmodpackresourcepackshaderrequired

    The project type of the project

    downloadsintegerrequired

    The total number of downloads of the project

    icon_urlstring | null

    The URL of the project's icon

    colorinteger | null

    The RGB color of the project, automatically generated from the project icon

    thread_idstring

    The ID of the moderation thread associated with this project

    monetization_statusstringmonetizeddemonetizedforce-demonetized
    project_idstringrequired

    The ID of the project

    authorstringrequired

    The username of the project's author

    display_categoriesArray<string>

    A list of the categories that the project has which are not secondary

    versionsArray<string>required

    A list of the minecraft versions supported by the project

    followsintegerrequired

    The total number of users following the project

    date_createdstring<ISO-8601>required

    The date the project was added to search

    date_modifiedstring<ISO-8601>required

    The date the project was last modified

    latest_versionstring

    The latest version of minecraft that this project supports

    licensestringrequired

    The SPDX license ID of a project

    galleryArray<string>

    All gallery images attached to the project

    featured_gallerystring | null

    The featured gallery image of the project

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "slug": "my_project",
  "title": "My Project",
  "description": "A short description",
  "categories": [
    "technology",
    "adventure",
    "fabric"
  ],
  "client_side": "required",
  "server_side": "optional",
  "project_type": "mod",
  "downloads": 0,
  "icon_url": "https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AABBCCDD/b46513nd83hb4792a9a0e1fn28fgi6090c1842639.png",
  "color": 8703084,
  "thread_id": "TTUUVVWW",
  "monetization_status": "monetized",
  "project_id": "AABBCCDD",
  "author": "my_user",
  "display_categories": [
    "technology",
    "fabric"
  ],
  "versions": [
    "1.8",
    "1.8.9"
  ],
  "follows": 0,
  "date_created": "string",
  "date_modified": "string",
  "latest_version": "1.8.9",
  "license": "MIT",
  "gallery": [
    "https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AABBCCDD/images/009b7d8d6e8bf04968a29421117c59b3efe2351a.png",
    "https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AABBCCDD/images/c21776867afb6046fdc3c21dbcf5cc50ae27a236.png"
  ],
  "featured_gallery": "string"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "slug": "my_project",
  "title": "My Project",
  "description": "A short description",
  "categories": [
    "technology",
    "adventure",
    "fabric"
  ],
  "client_side": "required",
  "server_side": "optional",
  "project_type": "mod",
  "downloads": 0,
  "icon_url": "https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AABBCCDD/b46513nd83hb4792a9a0e1fn28fgi6090c1842639.png",
  "color": 8703084,
  "thread_id": "TTUUVVWW",
  "monetization_status": "monetized",
  "project_id": "AABBCCDD",
  "author": "my_user",
  "display_categories": [
    "technology",
    "fabric"
  ],
  "versions": [
    "1.8",
    "1.8.9"
  ],
  "follows": 0,
  "date_created": "string",
  "date_modified": "string",
  "latest_version": "1.8.9",
  "license": "MIT",
  "gallery": [
    "https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AABBCCDD/images/009b7d8d6e8bf04968a29421117c59b3efe2351a.png",
    "https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AABBCCDD/images/c21776867afb6046fdc3c21dbcf5cc50ae27a236.png"
  ],
  "featured_gallery": "string"
}

    NonSearchProject

    object
    slugstring

    The slug of a project, used for vanity URLs. Regex: ^[\w!@$()`.+,"\-']{3,64}$

    titlestring

    The title or name of the project

    descriptionstring

    A short description of the project

    categoriesArray<string>

    A list of the categories that the project has

    client_sidestringrequiredoptionalunsupportedunknown

    The client side support of the project

    server_sidestringrequiredoptionalunsupportedunknown

    The server side support of the project

    bodystring

    A long form description of the project

    statusstringapprovedarchivedrejecteddraftunlistedprocessingwithheldscheduledprivateunknown

    The status of the project

    requested_statusstring | nullapprovedarchivedunlistedprivatedraft

    The requested status when submitting for review or scheduling the project for release

    additional_categoriesArray<string>

    A list of categories which are searchable but non-primary

    issues_urlstring | null

    An optional link to where to submit bugs or issues with the project

    source_urlstring | null

    An optional link to the source code of the project

    wiki_urlstring | null

    An optional link to the project's wiki page or other relevant information

    discord_urlstring | null

    An optional invite link to the project's discord

    donation_urlsArray<ProjectDonationURL>

    A list of donation links for the project

    Show child attributes
    idstring

    The ID of the donation platform

    platformstring

    The donation platform this link is to

    urlstring

    The URL of the donation platform and user

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "slug": "my_project",
  "title": "My Project",
  "description": "A short description",
  "categories": [
    "technology",
    "adventure",
    "fabric"
  ],
  "client_side": "required",
  "server_side": "optional",
  "body": "A long body describing my project in detail",
  "status": "approved",
  "requested_status": "approved",
  "additional_categories": [
    "technology",
    "adventure",
    "fabric"
  ],
  "issues_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project/issues",
  "source_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project",
  "wiki_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project/wiki",
  "discord_url": "https://discord.gg/AaBbCcDd",
  "donation_urls": [
    {
      "id": "patreon",
      "platform": "Patreon",
      "url": "https://www.patreon.com/my_user"
    }
  ]
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "slug": "my_project",
  "title": "My Project",
  "description": "A short description",
  "categories": [
    "technology",
    "adventure",
    "fabric"
  ],
  "client_side": "required",
  "server_side": "optional",
  "body": "A long body describing my project in detail",
  "status": "approved",
  "requested_status": "approved",
  "additional_categories": [
    "technology",
    "adventure",
    "fabric"
  ],
  "issues_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project/issues",
  "source_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project",
  "wiki_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project/wiki",
  "discord_url": "https://discord.gg/AaBbCcDd",
  "donation_urls": [
    {
      "id": "patreon",
      "platform": "Patreon",
      "url": "https://www.patreon.com/my_user"
    }
  ]
}

    ServerRenderedProject

    object
    slugstring

    The slug of a project, used for vanity URLs. Regex: ^[\w!@$()`.+,"\-']{3,64}$

    titlestring

    The title or name of the project

    descriptionstring

    A short description of the project

    categoriesArray<string>

    A list of the categories that the project has

    client_sidestringrequiredoptionalunsupportedunknown

    The client side support of the project

    server_sidestringrequiredoptionalunsupportedunknown

    The server side support of the project

    project_typestringmodmodpackresourcepackshaderrequired

    The project type of the project

    downloadsintegerrequired

    The total number of downloads of the project

    icon_urlstring | null

    The URL of the project's icon

    colorinteger | null

    The RGB color of the project, automatically generated from the project icon

    thread_idstring

    The ID of the moderation thread associated with this project

    monetization_statusstringmonetizeddemonetizedforce-demonetized
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "slug": "my_project",
  "title": "My Project",
  "description": "A short description",
  "categories": [
    "technology",
    "adventure",
    "fabric"
  ],
  "client_side": "required",
  "server_side": "optional",
  "project_type": "mod",
  "downloads": 0,
  "icon_url": "https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AABBCCDD/b46513nd83hb4792a9a0e1fn28fgi6090c1842639.png",
  "color": 8703084,
  "thread_id": "TTUUVVWW",
  "monetization_status": "monetized"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "slug": "my_project",
  "title": "My Project",
  "description": "A short description",
  "categories": [
    "technology",
    "adventure",
    "fabric"
  ],
  "client_side": "required",
  "server_side": "optional",
  "project_type": "mod",
  "downloads": 0,
  "icon_url": "https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AABBCCDD/b46513nd83hb4792a9a0e1fn28fgi6090c1842639.png",
  "color": 8703084,
  "thread_id": "TTUUVVWW",
  "monetization_status": "monetized"
}

    ModeratorMessage

    object

    A message that a moderator sent regarding the project

    messagestring

    The message that a moderator has left for the project

    bodystring | null

    The longer body of the message that a moderator has left for the project

    Example
    Copy
    null
    Example
    Copy
    null

    ProjectLicense

    object

    The license of the project

    idstring

    The SPDX license ID of a project

    namestring

    The long name of a license

    urlstring | null

    The URL to this license

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "id": "LGPL-3.0-or-later",
  "name": "GNU Lesser General Public License v3 or later",
  "url": "string"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "id": "LGPL-3.0-or-later",
  "name": "GNU Lesser General Public License v3 or later",
  "url": "string"
}

    GalleryImage

    object
    urlstringrequired

    The URL of the gallery image

    featuredbooleanrequired

    Whether the image is featured in the gallery

    titlestring | null

    The title of the gallery image

    descriptionstring | null

    The description of the gallery image

    createdstring<ISO-8601>required

    The date and time the gallery image was created

    orderinginteger

    The order of the gallery image. Gallery images are sorted by this field and then alphabetically by title.

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "url": "https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AABBCCDD/images/009b7d8d6e8bf04968a29421117c59b3efe2351a.png",
  "featured": true,
  "title": "My awesome screenshot!",
  "description": "This awesome screenshot shows all of the blocks in my mod!",
  "created": "string",
  "ordering": 0
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "url": "https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AABBCCDD/images/009b7d8d6e8bf04968a29421117c59b3efe2351a.png",
  "featured": true,
  "title": "My awesome screenshot!",
  "description": "This awesome screenshot shows all of the blocks in my mod!",
  "created": "string",
  "ordering": 0
}

    ModifiableProject

    object
    slugstring

    The slug of a project, used for vanity URLs. Regex: ^[\w!@$()`.+,"\-']{3,64}$

    titlestring

    The title or name of the project

    descriptionstring

    A short description of the project

    categoriesArray<string>

    A list of the categories that the project has

    client_sidestringrequiredoptionalunsupportedunknown

    The client side support of the project

    server_sidestringrequiredoptionalunsupportedunknown

    The server side support of the project

    bodystring

    A long form description of the project

    statusstringapprovedarchivedrejecteddraftunlistedprocessingwithheldscheduledprivateunknown

    The status of the project

    requested_statusstring | nullapprovedarchivedunlistedprivatedraft

    The requested status when submitting for review or scheduling the project for release

    additional_categoriesArray<string>

    A list of categories which are searchable but non-primary

    issues_urlstring | null

    An optional link to where to submit bugs or issues with the project

    source_urlstring | null

    An optional link to the source code of the project

    wiki_urlstring | null

    An optional link to the project's wiki page or other relevant information

    discord_urlstring | null

    An optional invite link to the project's discord

    donation_urlsArray<ProjectDonationURL>

    A list of donation links for the project

    Show child attributes
    idstring

    The ID of the donation platform

    platformstring

    The donation platform this link is to

    urlstring

    The URL of the donation platform and user

    license_idstring

    The SPDX license ID of a project

    license_urlstring | null

    The URL to this license

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "slug": "my_project",
  "title": "My Project",
  "description": "A short description",
  "categories": [
    "technology",
    "adventure",
    "fabric"
  ],
  "client_side": "required",
  "server_side": "optional",
  "body": "A long body describing my project in detail",
  "status": "approved",
  "requested_status": "approved",
  "additional_categories": [
    "technology",
    "adventure",
    "fabric"
  ],
  "issues_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project/issues",
  "source_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project",
  "wiki_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project/wiki",
  "discord_url": "https://discord.gg/AaBbCcDd",
  "donation_urls": [
    {
      "id": "patreon",
      "platform": "Patreon",
      "url": "https://www.patreon.com/my_user"
    }
  ],
  "license_id": "LGPL-3.0-or-later",
  "license_url": "string"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "slug": "my_project",
  "title": "My Project",
  "description": "A short description",
  "categories": [
    "technology",
    "adventure",
    "fabric"
  ],
  "client_side": "required",
  "server_side": "optional",
  "body": "A long body describing my project in detail",
  "status": "approved",
  "requested_status": "approved",
  "additional_categories": [
    "technology",
    "adventure",
    "fabric"
  ],
  "issues_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project/issues",
  "source_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project",
  "wiki_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project/wiki",
  "discord_url": "https://discord.gg/AaBbCcDd",
  "donation_urls": [
    {
      "id": "patreon",
      "platform": "Patreon",
      "url": "https://www.patreon.com/my_user"
    }

    ProjectDonationURL

    object
    idstring

    The ID of the donation platform

    platformstring

    The donation platform this link is to

    urlstring

    The URL of the donation platform and user

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "id": "patreon",
  "platform": "Patreon",
  "url": "https://www.patreon.com/my_user"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "id": "patreon",
  "platform": "Patreon",
  "url": "https://www.patreon.com/my_user"
}

    CreatableProject

    object
    slugstring

    The slug of a project, used for vanity URLs. Regex: ^[\w!@$()`.+,"\-']{3,64}$

    titlestring

    The title or name of the project

    descriptionstring

    A short description of the project

    categoriesArray<string>

    A list of the categories that the project has

    client_sidestringrequiredoptionalunsupportedunknown

    The client side support of the project

    server_sidestringrequiredoptionalunsupportedunknown

    The server side support of the project

    bodystring

    A long form description of the project

    statusstringapprovedarchivedrejecteddraftunlistedprocessingwithheldscheduledprivateunknown

    The status of the project

    requested_statusstring | nullapprovedarchivedunlistedprivatedraft

    The requested status when submitting for review or scheduling the project for release

    additional_categoriesArray<string>

    A list of categories which are searchable but non-primary

    issues_urlstring | null

    An optional link to where to submit bugs or issues with the project

    source_urlstring | null

    An optional link to the source code of the project

    wiki_urlstring | null

    An optional link to the project's wiki page or other relevant information

    discord_urlstring | null

    An optional invite link to the project's discord

    donation_urlsArray<ProjectDonationURL>

    A list of donation links for the project

    Show child attributes
    idstring

    The ID of the donation platform

    platformstring

    The donation platform this link is to

    urlstring

    The URL of the donation platform and user

    license_idstring

    The SPDX license ID of a project

    license_urlstring | null

    The URL to this license

    project_typestringmodmodpackrequired
    initial_versionsArray<EditableVersion>deprecated

    A list of initial versions to upload with the created project. Deprecated - please upload version files after initial upload.

    Show child attributes
    namestring

    The name of this version

    version_numberstring

    The version number. Ideally will follow semantic versioning

    changelogstring | null

    The changelog for this version

    dependenciesArray<VersionDependency>

    A list of specific versions of projects that this version depends on

    Show child attributes
    version_idstring | null

    The ID of the version that this version depends on

    project_idstring | null

    The ID of the project that this version depends on

    file_namestring | null

    The file name of the dependency, mostly used for showing external dependencies on modpacks

    dependency_typestringrequiredoptionalincompatibleembeddedrequired

    The type of dependency that this version has

    game_versionsArray<string>

    A list of versions of Minecraft that this version supports

    version_typestringreleasebetaalpha

    The release channel for this version

    loadersArray<string>

    The mod loaders that this version supports. In case of resource packs, use "minecraft"

    featuredboolean

    Whether the version is featured or not

    statusstringlistedarchiveddraftunlistedscheduledunknown
    requested_statusstring | nulllistedarchiveddraftunlisted
    primary_fileArray<string>

    The hash format and the hash of the new primary file

    file_typesArray<EditableFileType>

    A list of file_types to edit

    Show child attributes
    algorithmstringrequired

    The hash algorithm of the hash specified in the hash field

    hashstringrequired

    The hash of the file you're editing

    file_typeFileTypeEnum & anyrequired
    is_draftbooleandeprecated

    Whether the project should be saved as a draft instead of being sent to moderation for review. Deprecated - please always mark this as true.

    gallery_itemsArray<CreatableProjectGalleryItem>deprecated

    Gallery images to be uploaded with the created project. Deprecated - please upload gallery images after initial upload.

    Show child attributes
    itemstring

    The name of the multipart item where the gallery media is located

    featuredboolean

    Whether the image is featured in the gallery

    titlestring | null

    The title of the gallery image

    descriptionstring | null

    The description of the gallery image

    orderinginteger

    The order of the gallery image. Gallery images are sorted by this field and then alphabetically by title.

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "slug": "my_project",
  "title": "My Project",
  "description": "A short description",
  "categories": [
    "technology",
    "adventure",
    "fabric"
  ],
  "client_side": "required",
  "server_side": "optional",
  "body": "A long body describing my project in detail",
  "status": "approved",
  "requested_status": "approved",
  "additional_categories": [
    "technology",
    "adventure",
    "fabric"
  ],
  "issues_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project/issues",
  "source_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project",
  "wiki_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project/wiki",
  "discord_url": "https://discord.gg/AaBbCcDd",
  "donation_urls": [
    {
      "id": "patreon",
      "platform": "Patreon",
      "url": "https://www.patreon.com/my_user"
    }
  ],
  "license_id": "LGPL-3.0-or-later",
  "license_url": "string",
  "project_type": "modpack",
  "initial_versions": [
    {
      "name": "Version 1.0.0",
      "version_number": "1.0.0",
      "changelog": "List of changes in this version: ...",
      "dependencies": [
        {
          "version_id": "IIJJKKLL",
          "project_id": "QQRRSSTT",
          "file_name": "sodium-fabric-mc1.19-0.4.2+build.16.jar",
          "dependency_type": "required"
        }
      ],
      "game_versions": [
        "1.16.5",
        "1.17.1"
      ],
      "version_type": "release",
      "loaders": [
        "fabric",
        "forge",
        "minecraft"
      ],
      "featured": true,
      "status": "listed",
      "requested_status": "listed",
      "primary_file": [
        "sha1",
        "aaaabbbbccccddddeeeeffffgggghhhhiiiijjjj"
      ],
      "file_types": [
        {
          "algorithm": "sha1",
          "hash": "aaaabbbbccccddddeeeeffffgggghhhhiiiijjjj"
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "is_draft": true,
  "gallery_items": [
    {
      "item": "string",
      "featured": true,
      "title": "My awesome screenshot!",
      "description": "This awesome screenshot shows all of the blocks in my mod!",
      "ordering": 0
    }
  ]
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "slug": "my_project",
  "title": "My Project",
  "description": "A short description",
  "categories": [
    "technology",
    "adventure",
    "fabric"
  ],
  "client_side": "required",
  "server_side": "optional",
  "body": "A long body describing my project in detail",
  "status": "approved",
  "requested_status": "approved",
  "additional_categories": [
    "technology",
    "adventure",
    "fabric"
  ],
  "issues_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project/issues",
  "source_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project",
  "wiki_url": "https://github.com/my_user/my_project/wiki",
  "discord_url": "https://discord.gg/AaBbCcDd",
  "donation_urls": [
    {
      "id": "patreon",
      "platform": "Patreon",
      "url": "https://www.patreon.com/my_user"
    }
  ],
  "license_id": "LGPL-3.0-or-later",
  "license_url": "string",
  "project_type": "modpack",
  "initial_versions": [
    {
      "name": "Version 1.0.0",
      "version_number": "1.0.0",
      "changelog": "List of changes in this version: ...",
      "dependencies": [
        {
          "version_id": "IIJJKKLL",
          "project_id": "QQRRSSTT",
          "file_name": "sodium-fabric-mc1.19-0.4.2+build.16.jar",
          "dependency_type": "required"
        }
      ],
      "game_versions": [
        "1.16.5",
        "1.17.1"
      ],
      "version_type": "release",
      "loaders": [
        "fabric",
        "forge",
        "minecraft"
      ],
      "featured": true,
      "status": "listed",
      "requested_status": "listed",
      "primary_file": [
        "sha1",
        "aaaabbbbccccddddeeeeffffgggghhhhiiiijjjj"
      ],
      "file_types": [
        {
          "algorithm": "sha1",
          "hash": "aaaabbbbccccddddeeeeffffgggghhhhiiiijjjj"
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "is_draft": true,
  "gallery_items": [
    {
      "item": "string",
      "featured": true,
      "title": "My awesome screenshot!",
      "description": "This awesome screenshot shows all of the blocks in my mod!",
      "ordering": 0
    }
  ]
}

    BaseProject

    object
    slugstring

    The slug of a project, used for vanity URLs. Regex: ^[\w!@$()`.+,"\-']{3,64}$

    titlestring

    The title or name of the project

    descriptionstring

    A short description of the project

    categoriesArray<string>

    A list of the categories that the project has

    client_sidestringrequiredoptionalunsupportedunknown

    The client side support of the project

    server_sidestringrequiredoptionalunsupportedunknown

    The server side support of the project

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "slug": "my_project",
  "title": "My Project",
  "description": "A short description",
  "categories": [
    "technology",
    "adventure",
    "fabric"
  ],
  "client_side": "required",
  "server_side": "optional"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "slug": "my_project",
  "title": "My Project",
  "description": "A short description",
  "categories": [
    "technology",
    "adventure",
    "fabric"
  ],
  "client_side": "required",
  "server_side": "optional"
}

    EditableVersion

    object
    namestring

    The name of this version

    version_numberstring

    The version number. Ideally will follow semantic versioning

    changelogstring | null

    The changelog for this version

    dependenciesArray<VersionDependency>

    A list of specific versions of projects that this version depends on

    Show child attributes
    version_idstring | null

    The ID of the version that this version depends on

    project_idstring | null

    The ID of the project that this version depends on

    file_namestring | null

    The file name of the dependency, mostly used for showing external dependencies on modpacks

    dependency_typestringrequiredoptionalincompatibleembeddedrequired

    The type of dependency that this version has

    game_versionsArray<string>

    A list of versions of Minecraft that this version supports

    version_typestringreleasebetaalpha

    The release channel for this version

    loadersArray<string>

    The mod loaders that this version supports. In case of resource packs, use "minecraft"

    featuredboolean

    Whether the version is featured or not

    statusstringlistedarchiveddraftunlistedscheduledunknown
    requested_statusstring | nulllistedarchiveddraftunlisted
    primary_fileArray<string>

    The hash format and the hash of the new primary file

    file_typesArray<EditableFileType>

    A list of file_types to edit

    Show child attributes
    algorithmstringrequired

    The hash algorithm of the hash specified in the hash field

    hashstringrequired

    The hash of the file you're editing

    file_typeFileTypeEnum & anyrequired
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "name": "Version 1.0.0",
  "version_number": "1.0.0",
  "changelog": "List of changes in this version: ...",
  "dependencies": [
    {
      "version_id": "IIJJKKLL",
      "project_id": "QQRRSSTT",
      "file_name": "sodium-fabric-mc1.19-0.4.2+build.16.jar",
      "dependency_type": "required"
    }
  ],
  "game_versions": [
    "1.16.5",
    "1.17.1"
  ],
  "version_type": "release",
  "loaders": [
    "fabric",
    "forge",
    "minecraft"
  ],
  "featured": true,
  "status": "listed",
  "requested_status": "listed",
  "primary_file": [
    "sha1",
    "aaaabbbbccccddddeeeeffffgggghhhhiiiijjjj"
  ],
  "file_types": [
    {
      "algorithm": "sha1",
      "hash": "aaaabbbbccccddddeeeeffffgggghhhhiiiijjjj"
    }
  ]
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "name": "Version 1.0.0",
  "version_number": "1.0.0",
  "changelog": "List of changes in this version: ...",
  "dependencies": [
    {
      "version_id": "IIJJKKLL",
      "project_id": "QQRRSSTT",

    CreatableProjectGalleryItem

    object
    itemstring

    The name of the multipart item where the gallery media is located

    featuredboolean

    Whether the image is featured in the gallery

    titlestring | null

    The title of the gallery image

    descriptionstring | null

    The description of the gallery image

    orderinginteger

    The order of the gallery image. Gallery images are sorted by this field and then alphabetically by title.

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "item": "string",
  "featured": true,
  "title": "My awesome screenshot!",
  "description": "This awesome screenshot shows all of the blocks in my mod!",
  "ordering": 0
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "item": "string",
  "featured": true,
  "title": "My awesome screenshot!",
  "description": "This awesome screenshot shows all of the blocks in my mod!",
  "ordering": 0
}

    BaseVersion

    object
    namestring

    The name of this version

    version_numberstring

    The version number. Ideally will follow semantic versioning

    changelogstring | null

    The changelog for this version

    dependenciesArray<VersionDependency>

    A list of specific versions of projects that this version depends on

    Show child attributes
    version_idstring | null

    The ID of the version that this version depends on

    project_idstring | null

    The ID of the project that this version depends on

    file_namestring | null

    The file name of the dependency, mostly used for showing external dependencies on modpacks

    dependency_typestringrequiredoptionalincompatibleembeddedrequired

    The type of dependency that this version has

    game_versionsArray<string>

    A list of versions of Minecraft that this version supports

    version_typestringreleasebetaalpha

    The release channel for this version

    loadersArray<string>

    The mod loaders that this version supports. In case of resource packs, use "minecraft"

    featuredboolean

    Whether the version is featured or not

    statusstringlistedarchiveddraftunlistedscheduledunknown
    requested_statusstring | nulllistedarchiveddraftunlisted
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "name": "Version 1.0.0",
  "version_number": "1.0.0",
  "changelog": "List of changes in this version: ...",
  "dependencies": [
    {
      "version_id": "IIJJKKLL",
      "project_id": "QQRRSSTT",
      "file_name": "sodium-fabric-mc1.19-0.4.2+build.16.jar",
      "dependency_type": "required"
    }
  ],
  "game_versions": [
    "1.16.5",
    "1.17.1"
  ],
  "version_type": "release",
  "loaders": [
    "fabric",
    "forge",
    "minecraft"
  ],
  "featured": true,
  "status": "listed",
  "requested_status": "listed"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "name": "Version 1.0.0",
  "version_number": "1.0.0",
  "changelog": "List of changes in this version: ...",
  "dependencies": [
    {
      "version_id": "IIJJKKLL",
      "project_id": "QQRRSSTT",
      "file_name": "sodium-fabric-mc1.19-0.4.2+build.16.jar",
      "dependency_type": "required"
    }
  ],
  "game_versions": [
    "1.16.5",
    "1.17.1"
  ],
  "version_type": "release",
  "loaders": [
    "fabric",
    "forge",
    "minecraft"
  ],
  "featured": true,
  "status": "listed",
  "requested_status": "listed"
}

    EditableFileType

    object
    algorithmstringrequired

    The hash algorithm of the hash specified in the hash field

    hashstringrequired

    The hash of the file you're editing

    file_typeFileTypeEnum & anyrequired
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "algorithm": "sha1",
  "hash": "aaaabbbbccccddddeeeeffffgggghhhhiiiijjjj"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "algorithm": "sha1",
  "hash": "aaaabbbbccccddddeeeeffffgggghhhhiiiijjjj"
}

    VersionDependency

    object
    version_idstring | null

    The ID of the version that this version depends on

    project_idstring | null

    The ID of the project that this version depends on

    file_namestring | null

    The file name of the dependency, mostly used for showing external dependencies on modpacks

    dependency_typestringrequiredoptionalincompatibleembeddedrequired

    The type of dependency that this version has

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "version_id": "IIJJKKLL",
  "project_id": "QQRRSSTT",
  "file_name": "sodium-fabric-mc1.19-0.4.2+build.16.jar",
  "dependency_type": "required"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "version_id": "IIJJKKLL",
  "project_id": "QQRRSSTT",
  "file_name": "sodium-fabric-mc1.19-0.4.2+build.16.jar",
  "dependency_type": "required"
}

    FileTypeEnum

    string
    FileTypeEnumrequired-resource-packoptional-resource-packsources-jardev-jarjavadoc-jarunknownsignature
    Example
    Copy
    "required-resource-pack"
    Example
    Copy
    "required-resource-pack"
